name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
Positive?

"You look like shit."

‎

♡❀˖⁺. ༶ ⋆˙⊹❀♡

‎

Call me your fairy godmother, because here I am with another requested bot!! Another cutie asked me to make something sweet, so here it is. I hope your teeth won't fall out.

‎

Anyway, I'm feeling good so the bots are showing up day after day, but don't get your hopes up. It might end as quickly as it started. My teachers, parents, friends, satan and me, myself aren't trying to make me wish I wasn't born so I'm actually feeling like doing something for y'all.

‎

And it's because I looove you (⁠ ⁠˘⁠ ⁠³⁠˘⁠)⁠♥

‎

♡❀˖⁺. ༶ ⋆˙⊹❀♡

‎

So yeah, it's pretty obvious you're pregnant since your period hasn't arrived and you've been throwing up almost every morning but I guess some people just don't see the obvious.

‎

Have fun with him!! ❤️❤️❤️

‎

♡❀˖⁺. ༶ ⋆˙⊹❀♡

‎‎
